title: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites
impact: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites.

updates.content:
Title: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites

User impact: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites.

Current status: We received reports that the issue previously communicated via SP1296487 persists and we're checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites

User impact: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites.

Current status: We're reviewing service telemetry to better understand the impact scenario and determine our next steps.

Scope of impact: This event impacts any user attempting to use the search bar in SharePoint Online.

Next update by: Saturday, May 02, 2026, at 12:00 AM UTC

Title: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites

User impact: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites.

Final status: The investigation is complete and we've determined the service is healthy. A service incident didn't actually occur. This communication will expire in 24 hours.

This is the final update for the event.
